attestation_note: Three errors corrected: (1) Computational skills (R/Python, STATA/SPSS) were extracted as uniform 'expert' from a 5-dot CV rating that did not actually distinguish proficiency levels; corrected to proficient/expert/working_knowledge per tool. (2) MathWorks Lab role description used solo-leadership language ('led,' 'spearheaded') that overstated the candidate's actual team-based/co-led contribution; reworded to reflect shared ownership. (3) German language proficiency was extracted as 'expert' from the same uniform dot-rating; corrected to working_knowledge. Two other flagged items (Faculty Director as separate role; Skopje Teaching Excellence Award location) were checked and confirmed accurate as originally written — not every flag was an error.

English and Serbian confirmed accurate as native/expert.
